introSection: Joyride is a steel virtual reality roller coaster located at PowerPark in Kauhava, Southern Ostrobothnia, Finland. Opened in 2003, it was one of the park's first roller coasters.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single train with 6 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 24 riders.

fullText:
Joyride is a steel virtual reality roller coaster located at PowerPark in Kauhava, Southern Ostrobothnia, Finland. Opened in 2003, it was one of the park's first roller coasters.



Single train with 6 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 24 riders.
